languages.text: "Я готов принять смерть из ваших рук... Но если есть хотя бы малейший шанс выжить, я обязан это сделать. Ради Нунциуса".
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
languages.original_text: "Я готов принять смерть из ваших рук... Но если есть хотя бы малейший шанс выжить, я обязан это сделать. Ради Нунциуса".

traits.locale_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."
"I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

languages.text: "Ich bin bereit, durch Eure Hand zu sterben ... Aber wenn es auch nur einen Funken Hoffnung auf Überleben gibt, muss ich leben. Für Nuncius."
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin bereit, durch Eure Hand zu sterben ... Aber wenn es auch nur einen Funken Hoffnung auf Überleben gibt, muss ich leben. Für Nuncius."

languages.text: « Je suis prêt à accepter la mort si c'est vous qui me la donnez... Cependant, s'il existe le moindre espoir, je dois le saisir. Je ne peux pas abandonner Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis prêt à accepter la mort si c'est vous qui me la donnez... Cependant, s'il existe le moindre espoir, je dois le saisir. Je ne peux pas abandonner Nuncius. »

languages.text: «Estoy listo para aceptar la muerte a sus manos... Pero, si existe el más mínimo atisbo de esperanza de supervivencia, debo aferrarme a él. Por Nuncius».
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy listo para aceptar la muerte a sus manos... Pero, si existe el más mínimo atisbo de esperanza de supervivencia, debo aferrarme a él. Por Nuncius».

languages.text: "Sizin elinizden ölümü kucaklamaya hazırım... Fakat hayatta kalmak için ufak bir umut kırıntısı bile varsa çabalamalıyım. Nuncius'un hatırı için."
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: "Sizin elinizden ölümü kucaklamaya hazırım... Fakat hayatta kalmak için ufak bir umut kırıntısı bile varsa çabalamalıyım. Nuncius'un hatırı için."

languages.text: “我已准备好，死在你的手中……但，只要还有一线生机，我就必须抓住。为了努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: “我已准备好，死在你的手中……但，只要还有一线生机，我就必须抓住。为了努恩修斯。”

languages.text: 「あなたの手にかかって死を迎える覚悟はできています……ですが、生き延びる望みがほんのわずかでもあるのなら、私はそれをつかまねばなりません。ヌンキウスのために」
languages.original_text: "I am ready to embrace death by your hand... Yet, if there is but a flicker of hope for survival, I must seize it. For Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの手にかかって死を迎える覚悟はできています……ですが、生き延びる望みがほんのわずかでもあるのなら、私はそれをつかまねばなりません。ヌンキウスのために」
